tweets.author: rwatimes.bsky.social
tweets.text: ➤ While the February liquidation cascade highlighted the risks associated with leveraged Bitcoin lending and sharp price drops, the underlying infrastructure for these tokenized RWAs is maturing, integrating Bitcoin into the core machinery of finance.

tweets.author: rwatimes.bsky.social
tweets.text: ➤ These applications allow institutions to leverage Bitcoin for borrowing, margin trading, and as a reserve asset, mirroring traditional finance practices with assets like US Treasuries and gold.

tweets.author: rwatimes.bsky.social
tweets.text: ➤ Bitcoin is increasingly being utilized beyond ETFs to back financial products like insurance reserves, rated bonds, and large-scale loans, demonstrating its growing role as collateral and a balance sheet asset for institutions.
